name: meshy_check_task
description: Check the status of a Meshy.ai task (text-to-3D, remesh, or retexture). Returns the current status (PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, SUCCEEDED, FAILED). When a preview task succeeds, call meshy_generate_model with refine_task_id to add textures. When a refine, remesh, or retexture task succeeds, call meshy_download_model to download the result. If still in progress, wait ~10 seconds and check again.

task_id.description: The task ID returned by meshy_generate_model, meshy_remesh, or meshy_retexture.

source.description: Which API the task belongs to. Default: 'text-to-3d'. Use 'remesh' for meshy_remesh tasks, 'retexture' for meshy_retexture tasks.
